title: Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Powder Lily Blossom Rug Mat Odour Neutralise 500g
features: Shake and fresh carpet odour neutraliser eliminates bad odours which become trapped in carpets, such as cooking odours, tobacco, and pet odours.

Infused with the delicate and soothing scent of lily blossom, it refreshes your carpets and adds a welcoming aroma to your home helping to keep your carpets, rugs, mats and runners smelling clean and fresh.
Simply and easy to use, just lightly shake from side to side over your required surface and leave for 5 minutes. Vacuum up the powder to leave your area smelling clean and fresh.
Suitable for dry carpets only. - one 500g tub will treat up to 20sq metres.
description: Product Description Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Powder Lily Blossom Rug Mat Odour Neutralise 500g Ingredients Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Powder Lily Blossom Rug Mat Odour Neutralise 500g Directions Lightly shake the powder over the surface, leave for 5 minutes, then vacuum up.
